title: 3.06ct Natural Peridot Halo Ring S925 JR672Y
description:
Embrace the timeless elegance of natural gemstones set in premium S925 sterling silver. Known for its durability and hypoallergenic properties, S925 silver provides a secure and lasting foundation, ensuring this ring will retain its beauty over time. This piece combines natural beauty with expert craftsmanship, making it a stunning addition to any jewelry collection.

At the heart of this ring lies a striking 8x8mm, 3.06-carat natural peridot gemstone, celebrated for its vibrant green hue that symbolizes prosperity and harmony. Surrounding the center stone is a halo of teardrop-cut accent stones totaling 3.47 carats, adding a delicate brilliance and enhancing the radiance of the central peridot. With a total weight of 5.17 grams, this ring offers a comfortable yet luxurious feel, making it a perfect piece for those who appreciate elegance with a touch of nature’s beauty. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Natural Peridot Center Stone: A stunning 8x8mm, 3.06-carat peridot with a rich green hue.

Teardrop-Cut Accent Stones: 3.47 carats of sparkling stones that beautifully frame the center gemstone.

S925 Sterling Silver Setting: Hypoallergenic, tarnish-resistant, and crafted to endure, offering long-lasting shine.

Comfortable Weight: Weighing 5.17 grams, providing a substantial yet wearable feel.

A Symbol of Harmony: Known for its calming green tone, peridot is believed to bring peace and prosperity.

Add a touch of natural elegance to your collection with this captivating peridot ring, a perfect blend of sophistication and nature’s charm.
